title: Automatically Move Unchecked Tasks to Daily To-Do List in Obsidian
first_prompt: How can I set up Obsidian to automatically move unchecked items in my To-Do list in my Daily Template to the current day's To-Do list?
summary: Irwin sought to automate the process of migrating unchecked tasks from a daily template into the current day's to-do list within Obsidian. The conversation established that the solution required using the Templater plugin and creating a JavaScript file named `moveUncompletedTasks.js` within a dedicated `scripts` folder. After initial syntax corrections and configuration checks, the process hit a snag when the script failed to locate yesterday's note, requiring the final confirmation of the correct vault path: `/Users/irwinchen/vaults/Irwin's Obsidian Vault/Personal`.
